papers.title_en: An eXplainable ensemble framework for the detection of pulmonary embolism from CTPA images
papers.tldr: 肺栓塞（PE）是由于肺动脉阻塞导致的致命性疾病，及时诊断至关重要。本文提出了一种基于CTPA图像的可解释集成学习框架，用于自动化检测肺栓塞。该方法结合了多种深度学习模型，通过集成策略提高检测准确性，并引入可解释性机制辅助医生理解决策过程，为临床诊断提供高效且可靠的辅助工具。
papers.abstract_en: A pulmonary embolism (PE) can occur from an abrupt, partial, or occlusive blockageof the pulmonary arteries in the respiratory system. This condition can be fatal ifmedical attention is delayed. We propose an automated computer-aided detection …

papers.title_en: Multiparametric PET/CT Tensor Radiomics for Stability-Aware Machine Learning in Lung Cancer Survival Prediction
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌预后影像组学模型稳定性差和泛化能力有限的问题，提出了一种多参数张量影像组学框架。该框架通过整合多种PET-CT融合策略，提取更具鲁棒性的特征，旨在提高生存预测的准确性与稳定性，为肺癌的精准医疗提供了更可靠的量化评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: To address the challenges of model instability and limited generalizability inradiomics-based lung cancer prognosis, we developed a robust multiparametrictensor radiomics framework that integrates multiple PET-CT fusion strategies to …

papers.title_en: Handling missing data: AI approach for survival prediction in lung cancer despite missing data
papers.tldr: 本研究针对肺癌生存预测中多模态数据（如活检、CT、临床特征）经常缺失的挑战，提出了一种创新的AI处理方法。该方法通过整合不完整的临床轨迹和影像数据，解决了传统模型依赖完整数据集的局限性。研究证明，即使在部分模态数据缺失的情况下，该AI模型仍能提供可靠的预后评估，显著提升了临床决策的实用性。
papers.abstract_en: Optimal cancer prognostication combines multimodal data including biopsy results,CT scan, patient characteristics, and clinical trajectory thus far. However, manypatients do not have all modalities of data available, so requiring physicians to have …

papers.title_en: A Vision-Language End-to-End Framework for Automated Brain MRI Tumor Report Generation Using 3D GBR UNet Segmentation and Evidence-Aware Retrieval …
papers.tldr: 针对脑肿瘤MRI报告生成中存在的肿瘤形态异质性及多模态3D体积解释难题，本文提出一种端到端的视觉-语言框架。该框架结合了3D GBR UNet进行精准分割，并利用证据感知检索技术生成放射学报告。研究实现了从多模态影像到结构化诊断报告的自动化流程，显著提升了脑肿瘤诊断的准确性与效率，为临床决策提供了可靠支持。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal MRI faithful brain tumor segmentation and radiological reporting have notbeen achieved because of heterogeneous tumor morphology, low-contrastacquisitions, and the required coherent 3D volumetric interpretation across T1, T2 …

papers.title_en: RegionGate-CT: A Region-Gated Framework for Anatomy-Grounded CT Report Generation
papers.tldr: 本研究针对自动 CT 报告生成中全局信息与局部解剖区域关联不平衡的问题，提出了 RegionGate-CT 框架。该框架引入了区域门控机制，能够将生成的临床文本与具体的解剖区域精准对齐，从而在提升报告准确性的同时增强了模型的可解释性。实验证明，该方法在多项指标上优于现有技术，为解剖学驱动的医学影像分析提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Automated CT report generation aims to map volumetric imaging evidence toclinically structured text. Region-guided frameworks improve interpretability bylinking text to anatomical regions, but two limitations persist. First, global and region …

papers.title_en: CPM-XNet: Annotation-Efficient Deep-Learning Framework for Detecting Tuberculosis in Chest X-Ray Images
papers.tldr: Differentiating tumor from treatment-related changes(TRC) remains a key challenge in post-treatment glioblastoma (GBM) monitoring, asboth can exhibit overlapping enhancement and FLAIR abnormalities on standard …。

papers.title_en: Calibrated and Explainable Multiparametric MRI Radiomics for Differentiating Tumor Positive Disease from Treatment-Related Changes in Glioblastoma
papers.tldr: 针对胶质母细胞瘤（GBM）术后影像学表现难以区分肿瘤复发与治疗相关变化（TRC）的临床痛点，本研究开发了一种基于多参数MRI影像组学的分类模型。该模型不仅实现了高精度的鉴别诊断，还引入了校准机制和可解释性分析，确保了预测结果的可靠性与透明度，为GBM患者的精准随访和治疗方案调整提供了重要的技术支持。

papers.tldr: To compare the cross-site generalization of radiomic features and deeplearning embeddings for MRI prediction of substantial lymphovascular spaceinvasion (LVSI) in endometrial cancer. Materials and Methods: This retrospective two …。

papers.title_en: Automated lesion tracking and treatment response classification on [68Ga] Ga-PSMA-11 PET/CT across PPP, RECIP 1.0 and TLW frameworks
papers.tldr: 本研究验证了一种针对 [68Ga] Ga-PSMA-11 PET/CT 的自动病灶追踪算法，并评估其在 PPP、RECIP 1.0 和 TLW 三种 PSMA 治疗反应评估框架中的表现。通过与专家参考标准对比，证明了该算法在自动化病灶匹配和治疗反应分类方面的可靠性，为前列腺癌的精准医疗和临床决策提供了高效的自动化评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Purpose This study aimed to validate an automated lesion-tracking algorithm for[68Ga] Ga-PSMA-11 PET/CT against expert reference matches and to evaluate itsintegration into three PSMA-specific treatment response frameworks—the Response …

papers.title_en: Update to" Renal and Multiorgan Safety of 177Lu-PSMA-617 in Patients with Metastatic Castration-Resistant Prostate Cancer in the VISION Dosimetry Substudy"

papers.title_en: PI-RADS–stratified MRI-based PSA Density for Predicting Adverse Pathology after Robotic-assisted Laparoscopic Radical Prostatectomy
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在评估基于PI-RADS分层的MRI前列腺特异性抗原密度（PSAD）在预测机器人辅助前列腺癌根治术（RARP）后不良病理（AP）中的临床价值。通过分析mpMRI数据，研究发现PSAD在不同PI-RADS级别中表现出不同的预测效能。该研究为前列腺癌患者的术前风险分层提供了重要依据，有助于识别高危患者并优化手术方案。
papers.abstract_en: Background In the modern magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) era, prostate-specificantigen (PSA) density (PSAD) derived from multiparametric MRI (mpMRI) hasbecome an accessible biomarker for risk stratification in localized prostate cancer …

papers.title_en: Citation-Aware Continual Pre-Training for Biomedical Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对生物医学文献中引用关系被忽视的问题，提出了一种引用感知的持续预训练方法。该方法通过整合文献间的引用链接这一结构化知识，增强了模型对科学研究间关联性的理解。实验证明，这种方法能有效提升生物医学语言模型在处理复杂领域知识时的性能，为构建更具领域洞察力的预训练模型提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: The biomedical literature contains rich structured knowledge, including citation linksthat encode relationships between scientific studies, but such information is typicallyignored in standard language model pre-training. We propose a citation-aware …

papers.title_en: A knowledge enhanced framework for interpretable medical visual question and answering via large foundation model
papers.tldr: 本研究针对医疗视觉问答（MVQA）中模型解释性不足的问题，提出了一种基于大型基础模型的知识增强框架。该框架结合了大规模语言模型（LLM）和多模态模型，通过引入外部医学知识库来增强模型对医学图像的理解能力。主要贡献在于提升了MVQA系统的准确性，并为诊断过程提供了可解释的依据，有效缓解了基础模型在特定医学领域知识匮乏的局限性。
papers.abstract_en: Medical visual question answering (MVQA) plays a vital role in understandingmedical images. However, although foundation models including large languagemodel (LLM) and multimodal model trained on extensive medical datasets have …

papers.title_en: The Illusion of Generalization in Tabular Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究对表格语言模型（TLM）声称的强大泛化能力进行了系统性审视。研究者以 Tabula-8B 为代表模型，利用 UniPredict 框架中的 165 个数据集进行了大规模重新评估。结果表明，TLM 在表格预测中的优异表现可能并非源于真正的泛化，而是存在“泛化幻觉”现象，这一发现挑战了当前对 TLM 性能的乐观估计，并为未来表格模型的发展提供了重要警示。
papers.abstract_en: Tabular Language Models (TLMs) have been claimed to achieve stronggeneralization for tabular prediction. We conduct a systematic re-evaluation ofTabula-8B as a representative TLM, utilizing 165 datasets from the UniPredict …

papers.title_en: MedAct: Removing the Human Bottleneck in Benchmarking Clinical LLM Safety
papers.tldr: Most medical benchmarks for large language models test factual recall throughmultiple-choice questions, but on-the-ground physicians do not have the luxury offour options to choose from. NOHARM (Wu et al., 2025) demonstrated this limitation …。

papers.tldr: Abstract Medical Visual Question Answering (Med-VQA) faces a critical dichotomybetween inference efficiency and reasoning depth. While the Multi-QuestionLearning (MQL) paradigm significantly reduces computational redundancy via …。

papers.title_en: Understanding Why Language Models Hallucinate: Testing Reasoning Against Priors
papers.tldr: Large language models often produce hallucinated answers that violate prompt-levelconstraints. A key diagnostic question is whether these failures reflect missingknowledge, or whether the model has the relevant information but follows the wrong …。

papers.tldr: Large vision language models (VLMs) report strong accuracy on medical question-answering, yet it remains unclear whether they reason from visual evidence orexploit textual shortcuts. We introduce a counterfactual evaluation framework that …。

papers.tldr: Vision-language alignment, the stage that bridges pretrained vision encoders andlarge language models, is widely treated as a form of pretraining requiring full-parameter updates. We challenge this view and investigate what happens when low …。

papers.tldr: Benchmark accuracy in video large language models (LLMs) is often treated asevidence of visual understanding. We audit this assumption across twenty modelsspanning 2-78B parameters and ten architecture families. We introduce the Visual …。
